name: argon2id — SaltedPassword for fixed password/salt/DEFAULT params
note: Generated by running the real argon2id() with KdfParams::DEFAULT (memory_kb=131072, time=4, parallelism=1, argon2_version=0x13). The salt and params are the SAME fixed scenario used by auth_message_default.json. Cross-language impls MUST reproduce this exact 32-byte output.
